_comment: Starter architecture-fitness ruleset for the cli quick-start family (grm-quick-start-template, #432). Bin-shaped: src/main.rs wires clap parsing (commands/) to real logic (core/) — argument parsing never embeds business logic, and core/ never depends on clap. Adapt the layer globs to the project's real module layout. To decline enforcement entirely, replace this file's contents with { "schema-version": 1, "opt_out": true, "opt_out-reason": "..." } — grm-architecture-audit surfaces that decision explicitly instead of silently passing. Design: docs/grimoire/design/architecture-fitness-design.md §Scaffold defaults.

required-file-content.message: Cargo.toml should set [profile.dev] debug = "line-tables-only" — shrinks target/debug while keeping backtrace-quality debug info (#447)
